case_title: IZAK OKON VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP PROPERTIES, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-05-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK, 506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2021 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKON, IZAK AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP PROPERTIES, LLC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKON, IZAK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2021 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-11-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP PROPERTIES, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKON, IZAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP PROPERTIES, LLC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00, OUT OF POCKET EXPENSES RELATED TO 2/2020 MOLD INCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-18-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP PROPERTIES, LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,796.00 FILED BY OKON, IZAK AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP PROPERTIES, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP PROPERTIES, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-11-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF IZAK OKON IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT MERIADIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP PEROPERTIES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RANDELL CHAPMAN, PRESIDENT. JAY LIEBERMAN, PROPERTY SUPERVISOR. PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2021 - JUDGMENT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKON, IZAK AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP PROPERTIES, LLC.
